notes: End-to-end assertions (image comes back from API) require a live GEMINI_API_KEY and are expected to be run manually by the user. The assertions below only cover what's verifiable without a real API call.

evals.name: missing-api-key
evals.prompt: Enhance the photo at /tmp/sample.jpg to 4K using the skill.
evals.expected_output: Script exits 1 with a clear message telling the user to set GEMINI_API_KEY and pointing to https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

evals.name: missing-input-file
evals.expected_output: Script exits 1 with 'input file not found' (with GEMINI_API_KEY set to a dummy value so we don't short-circuit on key).

evals.name: help-flag
evals.prompt: Show me how to use the enhance.py script.
evals.expected_output: `python3 enhance.py --help` prints usage, describes the --output flag, and the input argument.
